name: Sweet & Sour Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok.
2. Add garlic and ginger.
3. Stir in water, vinegar, sugar, and ketchup.
4. Dissolve cornstarch in 2 tbsp water.
5. Mix the dissolved cornstarch into the sauce.
6. Add salt to taste.
7. Cook until the mixture is clear.
8. Serve hot or refrigerate for later use. Reheat before serving over fish.
Source: Great Chefs of New Orleans, Tele-record Productions - 1983
www.greatchefs.com - 747 Magazine Street, New Orleans, LA 70130
Chefs The Wong Brothers, Trey Yuen Restaurant, New Orleans
